title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM's Mixture of Experts podcast from New York Tech Week covers how software engineering roles are changing with AI, the trend of companies depleting annual AI budgets quickly through tokenmaxxing, NVIDIA's new RTX Spark superchip enabling 120-billion-parameter models on personal PCs, and universities' need to integrate AI literacy into curricula as students face AI-transformed workplaces.
